center.name: Ngarkat Conservation Park
center.summary: Ngarkat Conservation Park是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括红眼先啸鹟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In Victoria, the red-lored whistler can be found in the Ngarkat / Big Desert / Wyperfield complex and the Murray-Sunset / Hattah complex of National Parks

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In Victoria, the red-lored whistler can be found in the Ngarkat / Big Desert / Wyperfield complex and the Murray-Sunset / Hattah complex of National Parks
